title: Verb: kinnu
content:
Lemma: kinnu (to buy / purchase)
Semantic: PURCHASE
Variants: kineko, kine, kinyo, kinye, kiniyo, kinne, kinna, kin, kharid, kharido, kharida, kharida gareko, mol linu
Common typos: kineye, kiney, kinaye, khirid, kharide, kinne ko
Negation: kinena, kinenan, nakineko, kharida garena, nakinyo
Examples:
- sariya kineko 5000 ko (bought iron rod for 5000)
- aaj cement 10 bora kinyo (bought 10 bags of cement today)
- mobile kharida gareko bill (bill for purchased mobile)

title: Verb: bechnu
content:
Lemma: bechnu (to sell)
Semantic: SALE
Variants: becheko, beche, bechyo, bechyo, bichyo, bechne, bechna, bech, bikri gareko, bikri bhayo, bechideko
Common typos: becheye, bechey, bikri garey, becheko cha, bicheko
Negation: bechena, bechinan, nabecheko, bikri bhayena, nabechyo
Examples:
- aaj 50 kg chamal bechyo (sold 50 kg rice today)
- mobile becheko receipt (receipt for sold mobile)
- total bikri bhayeko hisab (total sales account)

title: Verb: dinu
content:
Lemma: dinu (to give / to disburse)
Semantic: GIVE
Variants: deko, diyo, diye, dineko, dinu, din, dia, dieka, udharo deko, advance deko, payment deko
Common typos: dieko, dieyo, diyo ko, deko cha, diye ko
Negation: diyena, dinan, nadeko, nadiyo, dina sakina
Examples:
- Ram lai 5000 udharo deko (gave Ram 5000 on credit)
- driver lai advance deko 2000 (gave driver 2000 advance)
- supplier lai payment diyo (gave payment to supplier)

title: Verb: linu
content:
Lemma: linu (to take / to receive)
Semantic: RECEIVE
Variants: leko, liyo, liye, lineko, lin, lia, receive gareko, lida, liye ko, payment leko
Common typos: lieko, lieyo, leko cha, liye ko, lina ko
Negation: liyena, linan, naleko, naliyo, receive garena
Examples:
- customer bata payment leko (received payment from customer)
- advance leko 10000 (took advance of 10000)
- maal leko receipt (receipt for goods received)

title: Verb: tirnu
content:
Lemma: tirnu (to pay / to settle a due)
Semantic: PAYMENT_OUT
Variants: tireko, tiryo, tiriye, tirneko, tir, bhuktaan gareko, payment tireko, bujhaeko, tira, bhuktani deko
Common typos: tireyo, tireye, tireko cha, tirina, bhuktaan garey
Negation: tirena, tirinan, natireko, natiryo, bhuktaan garena
Examples:
- rent tireko 15000 (paid rent of 15000)
- supplier lai pura payment tiryo (paid supplier full payment)
- EMI tirna baaki cha (EMI payment is still due)

title: Verb: aunu
content:
Lemma: aunu (to come / to receive (inbound))
Semantic: INBOUND_RECEIPT
Variants: aayeko, aayo, aaune, aauney, aaa, prapta bhayo, aaucha, aai, receipt aayeko, payment aayeko
Common typos: aayeyo, aayeko cha, aayo cha, aaye ko, aaunay
Negation: aayena, aauna, prapta bhayena, naayeko, aayencha
Examples:
- payment aayeko 20000 (received payment of 20000)
- maal aayeko cha godam ma (goods have arrived at the warehouse)
- remittance aayo bhanera khabar aayo (news came that remittance has arrived)

example_sentences.en: goods have arrived at the warehouse
news came that remittance has arrived

title: Verb: janu
content:
Lemma: janu (to go / to be sent out / to be spent)
Semantic: OUTBOUND
Variants: gaeko, gayo, gaye, gako, janeko, gai, gayo bhanyo, kharcha gaeko, nikle ko
Common typos: gayeyo, gayeko, gako cha, gaye ko, janeko cha
Negation: gaena, gaina, nagaeko, nagayo, nikleyena
Examples:
- stock gaeko 30 bora (30 bags of stock has gone / been dispatched)
- paise kaha gaeko thaha chhaina (don't know where the money went)
- maal customer kaha gayo (goods went to customer)

example_sentences.en: 30 bags of stock has gone / been dispatched
don't know where the money went

title: Verb: garnu
content:
Lemma: garnu (to do / to perform (generic action verb))
Semantic: ACTION_GENERIC
Variants: gareko, garyo, gariye, garne, gara, gar, garai, process gareko, complete gareko, garnus
Common typos: gareyo, gareye, gareko cha, gariye ko, garey
Negation: garena, garena nai, nagareko, nagaryo, garna sakina
Examples:
- hisab gareko chhu (I have done the accounting)
- payment process garyo (processed the payment)
- entry garnu baki cha (entry is still pending)

title: Verb: rakhnu
content:
Lemma: rakhnu (to keep / to hold / to maintain (balance, stock, credit))
Semantic: HOLD_MAINTAIN
Variants: rakheko, rakhyo, rakhiye, rakhe, rakhne, rakha, rakh, jamma rakheko, hold rakheko, credit rakheko
Common typos: rakheyo, rakheye, rakheko cha, rakhiye ko, rakhey
Negation: rakhena, rakhinan, narakheko, narakhyo, rakhna sakina
Examples:
- 50000 advance rakheko cha (kept 50000 as advance)
- stock rakheko chhu godam ma (I have kept stock in the warehouse)
- udharo rakheko naam list (list of names with kept credit)

example_sentences.en: I have kept stock in the warehouse
list of names with kept credit

title: Verb: pathaaunu
content:
Lemma: pathaaunu (to send / to dispatch / to transfer)
Semantic: SEND_DISPATCH
Variants: pathaayeko, pathayo, pathaaeko, pathaaune, pathaai, send gareko, dispatch gareko, transfer gareko, pathaideko, courier gareko
Common typos: pathaayeyo, pathayeko, pataayeko, send garey, pathaeko
Negation: pathayena, pathauna, napathaayeko, send garena, dispatch garena
Examples:
- maal dispatch gareko chhu aaj (I have dispatched the goods today)
- bill pathaaeko cha email ma (bill has been sent via email)
- transfer gareko 15000 account ma (transferred 15000 to account)

example_sentences.en: I have dispatched the goods today
bill has been sent via email

title: Verb: firta garnu
content:
Lemma: firta garnu (to return / to refund / to send back)
Semantic: RETURN_REFUND
Variants: firta gareko, firta deko, firta pathaaeko, farkaaeko, return gareko, refund gareko, wapas gareko, wapas pathaaeko, firta aayo, firtaa
Common typos: firtha gareko, firta garey, return garey, refund garey, wapas garey
Negation: firta garena, return garena, refund diyena, farkaaena, wapas garena
Examples:
- damaged maal firta gareko (returned damaged goods)
- refund gareko 2000 customer lai (refunded 2000 to customer)
- supplier kaha maal wapas pathaaeko (sent goods back to supplier)

title: Verb: jamma garnu
content:
Lemma: jamma garnu (to deposit / to collect / to accumulate)
Semantic: DEPOSIT_COLLECT
Variants: jamma gareko, jamma deko, jamma bhayo, jamma gariyo, deposit gareko, collect gareko, jamma garai, jamma cha, jodeko
Common typos: jama gareko, jamma garey, deposit garey, jamma gareko cha, jama deko
Negation: jamma garena, deposit garena, collect garena, jamma bhayena, najamma gareko
Examples:
- bank ma 50000 jamma gareko (deposited 50000 in bank)
- din bhar ko cash jamma bhayo (cash collected throughout the day)
- member ko bachat jamma gareko (collected members' savings)

example_sentences.ne_roman: din bhar ko cash jamma bhayo

title: Verb: jhiknu
content:
Lemma: jhiknu (to withdraw / to pull out / to take out)
Semantic: WITHDRAWAL
Variants: jhikeko, jhikyo, jhikiye, jhike, withdraw gareko, nikaaleko, jhikaeko, jhika, cash jhikeko, jhikna
Common typos: jhikeyo, jhikeye, jhikeko cha, jhikiye ko, withdraw garey
Negation: jhikena, jhikinan, najhikeko, withdraw garena, nikaalna sakina
Examples:
- bank bata 30000 jhikeko (withdrew 30000 from bank)
- ATM bata cash jhikyo (withdrew cash from ATM)
- petty cash bata jhikeko 500 (withdrew 500 from petty cash)

title: Verb: lekhnu
content:
Lemma: lekhnu (to write / to record / to enter (in books))
Semantic: RECORD_ENTRY
Variants: lekheko, lekhyo, lekhiye, lekhe, record gareko, entry gareko, note gareko, lipi gareko, lekhaeko, lekhna
Common typos: lekheyo, lekheye, lekheko cha, note garey, entry garey
Negation: lekhena, lekhinan, nalekheko, record garena, entry garena
Examples:
- udharo kitab ma lekheko cha (written/recorded in the credit book)
- aaj ko bikri entry gareko (entered today's sales)
- hisab lekhna baki cha (accounting/recording is still pending)

title: Verb: ghatnu
content:
Lemma: ghatnu (to decrease / to reduce / to make a loss)
Semantic: DECREASE_LOSS
Variants: ghateko, ghatyo, ghatiye, ghate, ghatne, ghata, ghat, loss bhayo, kami bhayo, ghataaeko, cut gareko
Common typos: ghateyo, ghateye, ghateko cha, loss bhayeko, kami garey
Negation: ghatena, ghatinan, naghateko, loss bhayena, naghate
Examples:
- stock ghateko 20 bora (stock decreased by 20 bags)
- is mahina 5000 loss bhayo (there was a loss of 5000 this month)
- rate ghataeko supplier le (supplier reduced the rate)

example_sentences.en: there was a loss of 5000 this month

title: Verb: badhnu
content:
Lemma: badhnu (to increase / to grow / to add)
Semantic: INCREASE_GROWTH
Variants: badheko, badhyo, badhiye, badhe, badhne, badha, badh, badhaayeko, profit badhyo, badi, add gareko, increase bhayo
Common typos: badheyo, badheye, badheko cha, increase bhayeko, add garey
Negation: badhena, badhinan, nabadheko, nabadhyo, increase bhayena
Examples:
- bikri badhyo yo mahina (sales increased this month)
- rate badheko 10 rupiya (rate increased by 10 rupees)
- stock add gareko 50 piece (added 50 pieces to stock)

title: Verb: baki rakhnu
content:
Lemma: baki rakhnu (to keep on credit / to leave balance due)
Semantic: CREDIT_OUTSTANDING
Variants: baki rakheko, baki cha, udharo rakheko, baaki deko, credit rakheko, due rakheko, baki chhodeko, baakinai cha, pending cha, settle gareko chhaina
Common typos: baakie rakheko, baaki rakheko cha, udhaaro rakheko, credit rakheko cha, panding cha
Negation: baki chhaina, udharo chhaina, settle gareko, zero balance cha, pura tireko
Examples:
- Mohan ko 8000 baki cha (Mohan has 8000 outstanding/due)
- udharo rakheko list nikaal (pull out the list of those with credit)
- supplier lai 15000 baki rakheko (15000 kept due to supplier)

example_sentences.en: pull out the list of those with credit

title: Verb: saadhnu
content:
Lemma: saadhnu (to settle / to reconcile / to clear dues)
Semantic: SETTLE_RECONCILE
Variants: saadheko, saadyo, saadhiye, saadhe, settle gareko, clear gareko, milaaeko, hisab milaaeko, bhuktaan gareko, saadhna
Common typos: saaadeyo, sadeko, settle garey, clear garey, hisab milaay
Negation: saadhena, sadhinan, nasaadheko, settle garena, clear garena
Examples:
- Ram sanga hisab saadheko chhu (I have settled accounts with Ram)
- mahina antama baki saadh garnu (settle dues at the end of the month)
- pura hisab milaaeko chha (all accounts have been reconciled)

example_sentences.en: I have settled accounts with Ram
settle dues at the end of the month

title: Verb: banaaunu
content:
Lemma: banaaunu (to make / to prepare / to create (bill, account, report))
Semantic: CREATE_PREPARE
Variants: banaaeko, banayo, banaaiyo, banaai, banaaune, taiyaar gareko, create gareko, tiyaar gareko, draft gareko, banaunu
Common typos: banaayeko, banaayeyo, banayo ko, create garey, draft garey
Negation: banaaena, banaaina, nabanaaeko, create garena, taiyaar garena
Examples:
- invoice banaaeko cha pathaauna (bill has been prepared to send)
- monthly report banaaunu parcha (need to prepare monthly report)
- naya account banaaeko (created a new account)

example_sentences.en: bill has been prepared to send

title: Verb: kinbech garnu
content:
Lemma: kinbech garnu (to trade / to buy and sell)
Semantic: TRADE
Variants: kinbech gareko, kinbech garchhu, vyaapaar gareko, trade gareko, kharida bikri gareko, lenden gareko, dhandha gareko, byapaar gareko
Common typos: kinbhech gareko, kinbach gareko, trade garey, byapar gareko, lende gareko
Negation: kinbech garena, vyaapaar garena, trade garena, dhandha garena
Examples:
- tarkari kinbech gareko din ko hisab (daily trade account of vegetables)
- wholesale ma kinbech gareko profit (profit from wholesale trading)
- byapaar gareko 5 barsha bhayo (have been trading for 5 years)

example_sentences.ne_roman: tarkari kinbech gareko din ko hisab

title: Verb: bhuktan garnu
content:
Lemma: bhuktan garnu (to make payment / to pay off / to settle a bill)
Semantic: PAYMENT_SETTLEMENT
Variants: bhuktan gareko, bhuktaan gareko, bhuktani gareko, payment gareko, bhujaaeko, paisa tireko, receipt deko, settle gareko, chukta gareko, bhuktaan bhayo
Common typos: buktaan gareko, bhuktan garey, bhuktan gareko cha, payment garey, chukta garey
Negation: bhuktan garena, bhuktaan garena, payment garena, chukta garena, bhuktaan bhayena
Examples:
- supplier ko bill bhuktaan gareko (settled/paid supplier's bill)
- pura payment bhuktan gariyo (full payment has been settled)
- bhuktaan gareko receipt linus (take the receipt of the payment made)

example_sentences.en: take the receipt of the payment made

title: Verb: kharcha garnu
content:
Lemma: kharcha garnu (to spend / to incur expense)
Semantic: EXPENSE
Variants: kharcha gareko, kharcheko, kharcha bhayo, kharcha gariyo, kharcha garai, lageko, lagaayeko, cost gareko, spend gareko, kharcha laaeko
Common typos: kharcha garey, kharaca gareko, kharca gareko, spend garey, lageko cha
Negation: kharcha garena, kharcha bhayena, nalageko, spend garena, kharcha garena nai
Examples:
- site ma 30000 kharcha gareko (spent 30000 on site)
- aaj kati kharcha bhayo total (what was the total expenditure today)
- diesel ma 5000 kharcha laaeko (spent 5000 on diesel)

example_sentences.en: what was the total expenditure today

title: Verb: kamaunu
content:
Lemma: kamaunu (to earn / to generate income / to profit)
Semantic: EARN_INCOME
Variants: kamaaeko, kamayo, kamaaiyo, kamaai, aamdani gareko, profit gareko, income aayeko, kamaaune, kama, faida gareko
Common typos: kamaayeko, kamaayeyo, profit garey, amdani gareko, faida garey
Negation: kamaaena, kamaaina, nakamaaeko, profit garena, aamdani bhayena
Examples:
- is hapta 15000 kamaaeko (earned 15000 this week)
- din ko net kamaai kati bhayo (what was today's net earnings)
- faida gareko kati ho is mahina (how much profit was made this month)

example_sentences.ne_roman: din ko net kamaai kati bhayo
faida gareko kati ho is mahina
example_sentences.en: how much profit was made this month

title: Verb: bachaat garnu
content:
Lemma: bachaat garnu (to save (money) / to accumulate savings)
Semantic: SAVE_SAVINGS
Variants: bachaat gareko, bachaayeko, bachaai, savings gareko, jamma gareko, sanchit gareko, bacha, bachaaune, fundo rakheko, reserve gareko
Common typos: bachate gareko, bachat gareko, savings garey, bacha garey, sanchit garey
Negation: bachaat garena, bachaaina, nabachaayeko, savings garena, reserve garena
Examples:
- mahina ko 5000 bachaat gareko (saved 5000 per month)
- emergency ko lagi reserve gareko (reserved for emergency)
- cooperative ma bachat jamma gareko (deposited savings in cooperative)

title: Verb: rin dinu
content:
Lemma: rin dinu (to lend / to give a loan)
Semantic: LEND_LOAN_OUT
Variants: rin deko, rin diyo, udharo deko, loan deko, saapo deko, advance deko, rin dineko, rin laaeko, saapo gareko, credit deko
Common typos: rin dieko, rin dieyo, loan dieko, saapo dieyo, credit dieyo
Negation: rin diyena, rin dinan, loan diyena, narin deko, saapo diyena
Examples:
- Shyam lai 10000 rin deko (lent 10000 to Shyam)
- saapo deko hisab track garna parcha (need to track the record of loans given)
- udharo deko sabai jana ko list (list of all persons given credit)

example_sentences.ne_roman: saapo deko hisab track garna parcha
example_sentences.en: need to track the record of loans given

example_sentences.ne_roman: udharo deko sabai jana ko list
example_sentences.en: list of all persons given credit
